notes: Iteration-1: 13 evals covering 6 checks + 3 output formats + 3 hook scenarios + 1 baseline regression. Per-eval score = 6 points (total/error/warning/info counts + codes present + no unexpected). Aggregate runner: evals/run-evals.ts. Fixtures: tests/fixtures/spec-reality-check/.

breakdown: all expected codes present in actual
no codes outside expected_codes_optional union expected_codes

evals.name: fc-create-exists-stale-create
evals.prompt: Run verify on stale-create fixture (action=create on pre-existing file). Expect 1 ERROR FC_CREATE_EXISTS.

evals.name: fc-edit-and-delete-missing
evals.prompt: Run verify on missing-edit fixture (action=edit + action=delete both on missing files). Expect 1 ERROR FC_EDIT_MISSING + 1 ERROR FC_DELETE_MISSING.

evals.name: narrative-path-missing
evals.prompt: Run verify on narrative-drift fixture (FR.md inline backtick path on missing file). Expect ≥1 WARNING NARRATIVE_PATH_MISSING.

evals.name: code-drift-positive-git-commits-present
evals.prompt: Run verify on code-drift fixture with tmp git repo seeded with FR-1 commit (file created by setup → no FC_EDIT_MISSING). Expect 1 WARNING CODE_DRIFT_FR_ALREADY_DONE, 0 ERROR.

evals.name: code-drift-skipped-no-git
evals.prompt: Run verify on code-drift fixture WITHOUT git init. Expect INFO CODE_DRIFT_SKIPPED + zero CODE_DRIFT_FR_ALREADY_DONE.

evals.name: tasks-fc-orphan-warning
evals.prompt: Run verify on task-orphan fixture (TASKS file not in FC). Expect WARNING TASKS_FC_CONSISTENCY for orphan TASK.

evals.name: format-json-valid-output
evals.prompt: Spawn verify.ts --format json on missing-edit fixture. Expect stdout parses as JSON with shape {findings: [], summary: {total, by_severity, by_check}}.

evals.name: format-human-readable-output
evals.prompt: Spawn verify.ts --format human on missing-edit fixture. Expect stdout contains 'Reality check:' header + 'FC_EDIT_MISSING' check name.

evals.name: format-markdown-valid-table
evals.prompt: Spawn verify.ts --format markdown on missing-edit fixture. Expect stdout contains markdown table header + finding row.

evals.name: baseline-clean-shipped-spec-zero-errors
evals.prompt: Run verify on real shipped clean spec .specs/spec-workflow-md-validation/. Expect 0 ERRORs (regression baseline).

evals.name: baseline-canonical-plugin-after-cleanup-zero-errors
evals.prompt: Run verify on .specs/dev-pomogator-canonical-plugin/ AFTER 2026-05-24 cleanup. Expect 0 ERRORs (regression — cleanup must not regress).

evals.name: hook-deny-on-spec-with-errors
evals.prompt: Spawn verify-hook.ts with stdin tool_name=ExitPlanMode, plan referencing .specs/missing-edit/. Expect deny output with FC_EDIT_MISSING in permissionDecisionReason.

tool_input.plan: Implement features in .specs/missing-edit/ and modify code.

evals.name: hook-permit-on-clean-plan
evals.prompt: Spawn verify-hook.ts with stdin plan having no spec refs. Expect empty stdout (permit).

tool_input.plan: Generic plan with no spec references.

evals.name: hook-failopen-on-invalid-stdin
evals.prompt: Spawn verify-hook.ts with malformed stdin. Expect exit 0 + empty stdout (fail-open).
